---
name: Request a new mirror
about: Are the current mirrors not sufficient for your needs? Request a new mirror here.
title: "Add mirror [mirror name]"
labels: mirror-request
assignees: ""
---

## Mirror Information

**Name**

<!-- e.g. OVH, Koddos, ... -->

**URL(s) to mirror**

<!-- e.g. https://mirrors.ovh.net/ -->

**Supported ISOs**

<!-- List of ISOs supported by this mirror, or ISOs you want to see supported e.g. Ubuntu, Fedora, memtest86+ -->

**What makes this mirror a good candidate?**

<!-- e.g. location, speed, reliability, etc. -->

**Is this mirror endorsed by the ISO publishers?**

<!-- e.g. is it listed on the official download/release page of the ISOs it supports? If not, what makes us be able to trust it? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else that might help: mirror location, speed, etc. -->
